zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Chaumont II - Sixth Seigneur De Chaumont於1134年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登豪-馬內豪蒙特豪蒙吉諾爾德時，他的父親Osmond Chaumont II17歲，母親Countess Frangal de Fougères - Countess of Bretagne14歲。他和Lady Richilde Sinclair - Lady of Roslin至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1174年在法國享年40歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Chaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Gilles, Raoul, Yvon.  Spanish Alicia, Andres, Arturo, Beatriz, Elia, Jose, Julio, Miguel, Raul.
French: habitational name from any of numerous places called Chaumont ‘bald mountain’ (ultimately from Latin calvus mons), for example in Cher, Orne, Jura, Haute-Savoie.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Chaumont in Orne (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Japanese: written 井伊 ‘well’ and ‘that’, the name one of Japan's great daimyō families, originally based in Tōtōmi (now part of Shizuoka prefecture), later in Kōzuke (now Gunma prefecture) and Ōmi (now Shiga prefecture). Other variants of the name substitute either character with similar sounding characters such as 飯 ‘cooked rice’, 居 ‘residence’, and so forth. It was formerly Romanized as Iyi. — Note: In the population figure published by the US Census Bureau, the Roman number II (meaning ‘the second’, i.e. ‘the younger’ of the two bearers of the name) is apparently also counted as a surname Ii.

History: Ii Naomasa (1561–1602) was awarded lands in Kōzuke and Ōmi for his service in the civil wars that won the shōgunate (military dictatorship) for Tokugawa Ieyasu. His family built the beautiful castle of Hikone, which still stands. His descendant Ii Naosuke (1815–1860) ruled Japan for two years as Tairō (Great Elder) and played a major part in signing treaties that opened Japan to foreign trade at the end of the Tokugawa Shōgunate. He was assassinated by adherents of the anti-foreign party.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Chaumont II - Sixth Seigneur De Chaumont was born in 1134, in Chaumont-Nord, Chaumont, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, his father, Osmond Chaumont II, was 17 and his mother, Countess Frangal de Fougères - Countess of Bretagne, was 14. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Lady Richilde Sinclair - Lady of Roslin. He died in 1174, in France, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Chaumont II - Sixth Seigneur De Chaumont est né en 1134, à Chaumont-Nord, Chaumont, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Osmond Chaumont II, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Countess Frangal de Fougères - Countess of Bretagne, avait 14 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Lady Richilde Sinclair - Lady of Roslin. Il est décédé en 1174, à France, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Chaumont II - Sixth Seigneur De Chaumont 1134 in Chaumont-Nord, Chaumont, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Osmond Chaumont II 17 und seine Mutter Countess Frangal de Fougères - Countess of Bretagne 14. Er hatte mit Lady Richilde Sinclair - Lady of Roslin mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1174 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Chaumont II - Sixth Seigneur De Chaumont è nato il nel 1134 nel Chaumont-Nord, Chaumont, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, il suo padre, Osmond Chaumont II, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Countess Frangal de Fougères - Countess of Bretagne, aveva 14 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Lady Richilde Sinclair - Lady of Roslin. Morì nel 1174, nel Francia, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Chaumont II - Sixth Seigneur De Chaumontが1134年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンハウテ-マルンチャウモントチャウモント-ノードで生まれた時，父Osmond Chaumont IIは17歳，母Countess Frangal de Fougères - Countess of Bretagneは14歳であった。彼はLady Richilde Sinclair - Lady of Roslinとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1174年にフランスで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Chaumont II - Sixth Seigneur De Chaumont(이)가 1134년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 하테-마니 차몽 차몽-노르드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Osmond Chaumont II(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Countess Frangal de Fougères - Countess of Bretagne(은)는 14세였다. 그는 Lady Richilde Sinclair - Lady of Roslin(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1174년 프랑스에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Chaumont II - Sixth Seigneur De Chaumont nasceu em 1134, em Chaumont-Nord, Chaumont, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Osmond Chaumont II, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Countess Frangal de Fougères - Countess of Bretagne, tinha 14 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Lady Richilde Sinclair - Lady of Roslin. Ele faleceu em 1174, em França, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Chaumont II - Sixth Seigneur De Chaumont родился в 1134 г. в местности чаумонт-норд, чаумонт, хауте-марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция, его отцу по имени Osmond Chaumont II было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Countess Frangal de Fougères - Countess of Bretagne, 14. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Lady Richilde Sinclair - Lady of Roslin. Он умер в 1174 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Chaumont II - Sixth Seigneur De Chaumont nació en 1134, en Chaumont-Nord, Chaumont, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Osmond Chaumont II, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Countess Frangal de Fougères - Countess of Bretagne, tenía 14 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Lady Richilde Sinclair - Lady of Roslin. Murió en 1174, en Francia, a la edad de 40 años.
